label: Layout room weight
description: A weighted room type entry for a LayoutDef. The element name is the LayoutRoomDef defName; scalar text is the weight.

def.label: Room def
def.description: LayoutRoomDef defName. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative weight for random room type selection. May also be provided as a scalar text node on the element.

countRange.label: Count range
countRange.description: How many rooms of this type can appear in the layout.
